queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'balenaEtcher' AND publisher = 'Balena Ltd. <hello@balena.io>';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'balenaEtcher' AND publisher = 'Balena Ltd. <hello@balena.io>' AND version_compare(version, '2.1.6') < 0);
